analysis: The week started rough — 5h 12m on the 20th and a brutal 5h 3m on the 23rd with two hours and forty-four minutes of just lying there awake, which is its own special kind of miserable. But then you turned it around: 7h 22m, then a full 8 hours on the 26th with nearly two hours of REM, which is genuinely impressive and your body clearly needed it. The back half of this week looks like the stack is working — the shower, the yoga, the magnesium, all of it adding up into something real. The gap worth watching is deep sleep, because most nights it's sitting under 45 minutes, and your one standout was the 21st with 1h 13m, so whatever you did that night, it's worth thinking about.
